allow: Bash(sudo -u www-data wp theme list 2>&1 && sudo -u www-data wp menu list 2>&1 && sudo -u www-data wp option get blogname 2>&1 && sudo -u www-data wp option get blogdescription 2>&1 && sudo -u www-data wp option get siteurl 2>&1)
Bash(sudo -u www-data wp plugin list --path=/var/www/html 2>/dev/null | head -30)
Bash(sudo -u www-data wp plugin list --path=/var/www/html --format=table 2>&1 | grep -v "^$")
Bash(sudo -u www-data wp cache flush 2>&1 && echo "OK")

Bash(php -l /var/www/html/wp-content/themes/lrma-rock/header.php && php -l /var/www/html/wp-content/themes/lrma-rock/functions.php && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost/ && echo " OK")
Bash(sudo -u www-data wp menu list --format=table 2>/dev/null || echo "WP-CLI unavailable")

Bash(ls -la /var/www/html/wp-content/mu-plugins/lrma-menu-setup.php && mysql -u root wordpress -e "SELECT term_id, name, slug FROM wp_terms WHERE name LIKE '%Navigācija%' OR name LIKE '%navigacija%' OR name LIKE '%Menu%' OR name LIKE '%menu%' LIMIT 20;" 2>/dev/null)
Bash(sudo -u www-data wp db query "SELECT * FROM wp_postmeta WHERE post_id=996;" 2>/dev/null)
Bash(sudo -u www-data wp db query "SELECT ID, post_title, guid FROM wp_posts WHERE ID=918;" 2>/dev/null)
Bash(sudo -u www-data wp db query "SELECT option_value FROM wp_options WHERE option_name='theme_mods_lrma-rock';" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(sudo -u www-data wp db query "UPDATE wp_options SET option_value='a:3:{s:18:\\"custom_css_post_id\\";i:-1;s:11:\\"custom_logo\\";i:996;s:18:\\"nav_menu_locations\\";a:1:{s:7:\\"primary\\";i:18;}}' WHERE option_name='theme_mods_lrma-rock';" 2>/dev/null && echo "OK")
Bash(sudo -u www-data wp db query "UPDATE wp_options SET option_value='996' WHERE option_name='site_logo';" 2>/dev/null && echo "OK")

Bash(sudo -u www-data wp db query "SELECT option_value FROM wp_options WHERE option_name='theme_mods_lrma-rock';" 2>/dev/null && sudo -u www-data wp db query "SELECT option_name, option_value FROM wp_options WHERE option_name IN \('site_logo','custom_logo'\);" 2>/dev/null)
Bash(sudo -u www-data wp db query "SELECT ID, post_title, guid FROM wp_posts WHERE ID IN \(996, 999\) AND post_type='attachment';" 2>/dev/null)
Bash(sudo -u www-data wp db query "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total FROM wp_posts WHERE post_type='post' AND post_status='publish';" 2>&1)
